Identity.Name: Pset_StingTag7
Identity.Definition: TAG7 — rich descriptive narrative carried alongside the 8-segment Pset_StingTags. Six sub-sections A through F, each holding a different facet of the element's full description: identity, system+function, spatial context, lifecycle, technical specs, classification. Built by the TAG7 narrative engine (TAG7Builder) on every tag-write; rendered into multi-line annotations on views via host-side rich-text label families. Paragraph depth toggles (TAG_PARA_STATE_1/2/3_BOOL) control how much detail is shown per view tier.

Governance.StandardsBasis: STING TAG7 narrative engine; Phase 11 paragraph-depth tier system; Phase 135 TokenProfile (which segments are visible per view)

Property.name: NarrativeFull
Property.Definition: Computed full TAG7 narrative — concatenation of sub-sections A through F joined by pipe-separators (|). DERIVED, not authoritative — host plugins compute on read from the six A-F sub-sections; storing this is a convenience for legacy consumers + non-STING tools that don't know how to assemble. When present, STING validators verify it matches the computed form.

Property.name: IdentityHeader
Property.Definition: Section A — Identity Header. Asset name + product code + manufacturer + model. Bold, blue per the default style. Example: "AHU-04 / Daikin VRV-IV / SuperHero series".

Property.name: SystemFunction
Property.Definition: Section B — System + Function. System type description + function code expanded. Italic, green. Example: "HVAC supply — variable-air-volume primary air distribution".

Property.name: SpatialContext
Property.Definition: Section C — Spatial Context. Room name + department + grid reference + zone. Normal weight, orange. Example: "Theatre 3 / Surgical Suite / Grid C-5 / Zone CLN-01".

Property.name: LifecycleStatus
Property.Definition: Section D — Lifecycle + Status. Status (NEW/EXISTING/DEMOLISHED/TEMPORARY) + revision + origin + maintenance frequency. Normal weight, red. Example: "NEW / Rev P02 / Specified / Quarterly PPM".

Property.name: TechnicalSpecs
Property.Definition: Section E — Technical Specs. Discipline-specific performance data (capacity / flow / voltage / pressure / weight). Bold, purple. Per-discipline-category template lives in LABEL_DEFINITIONS.json. Example: "Capacity: 12.5 kW / Flow: 1200 l/s / Static: 350 Pa / Sound: 38 dB(A)".

Property.name: Classification
Property.Definition: Section F — Classification. Uniformat + OmniClass + keynote + cost-code + ISO tag references. Italic, grey. Example: "Uniformat: D3045 / OmniClass: 23-33-23-13 / Keynote: HVAC-AHU-12 / NRM2: 5.7.2".

Property.name: ParagraphState1
Property.Definition: Paragraph depth tier 1 toggle. When true, sub-sections A + B are visible on this view's tags (minimal narrative). Phase 11 paragraph depth control.

Property.name: ParagraphState2
Property.Definition: Paragraph depth tier 2 toggle. When true, sub-sections A + B + C + D are visible (standard narrative). Phase 11 paragraph depth control.

Property.name: ParagraphState3
Property.Definition: Paragraph depth tier 3 toggle. When true, all six sub-sections A..F are visible (full narrative). Phase 11 paragraph depth control. Mutually exclusive with ParagraphState1/2 — exactly one should be true per view; multiple-true is a host-plugin bug.

Rule.Description: NarrativeFull (when set) must equal the pipe-joined concatenation of IdentityHeader | SystemFunction | SpatialContext | LifecycleStatus | TechnicalSpecs | Classification. BEHAVIOURAL ASSERTION: TAG7Builder generates NarrativeFull from sub-sections on every write — drift means a host plugin bug, not user error. STING-side validator (Phase 187+) closes the equality check; the IDS pattern check is insufficient.
Rule.FailMessage: Stored NarrativeFull does not match concatenation of sub-sections.
Rule.RemediationInstruction: Run BuildTags to re-derive NarrativeFull from the six sub-sections.

Rule.Description: Exactly one of ParagraphState1 / ParagraphState2 / ParagraphState3 is true per element per view-context. Multi-true is contradictory. BEHAVIOURAL ASSERTION: enforced by the SetParagraphDepth command; static IFC snapshots can't distinguish "view A wants tier 2, view B wants tier 3" since the Pset is per-element, not per-view.
Rule.RemediationInstruction: Re-run SetParagraphDepth from the host plugin; clears competing flags.

Rule.Description: TechnicalSpecs (Section E) format depends on the element's Discipline + Product code via LABEL_DEFINITIONS.json (e.g. AHU shows "Capacity / Flow / Static / Sound", DB shows "Rating / Phases / Submains / Spare ways"). The format spec lives outside this Pset; IDS can't validate it. STING-side LabelDefinitionHelper enforces.
Rule.FailMessage: TechnicalSpecs format doesn't match the discipline+product label definition.
Rule.RemediationInstruction: Run BuildTags after verifying LABEL_DEFINITIONS.json has the right template for this discipline+product.
